title: Assertion failure in DeadCodeAnalysis during FSM range narrowing
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is an MLIR-level bug in CIRCT's comb-int-range-narrowing pass, not a SystemVerilog feature issue. The test case is written in MLIR using CIRCT dialects (fsm.machine, fsm.state, verif.refines, hw.constant) rather than SystemVerilog syntax.
